purpose: Defines the safe Agent Center approval workflow boundary for future PR creation and merge-gate work. This file is governance only and grants no runtime, PR, merge, deploy, or approval authority to the UI.

workflowSteps.label: UI-Entscheidung erfassen
workflowSteps.description: Agent Center may show Zustimmen/Ablehnen as a human intent field, but it stays local/UI-only until a backend owner workflow exists.

workflowSteps.label: Owner authentifizieren
workflowSteps.description: A future PR workflow must verify an authorized repository owner or maintainer before creating branches, commits, or PRs.

workflowSteps.label: PR-Entwurf mit Scope-Grenzen
workflowSteps.description: PR creation requires a narrow task scope, changed-file inventory, safety classification, and explicit exclusion of protected runtime authority.

workflowSteps.label: Quality-/Policy-Gates
workflowSteps.description: Required checks must run and failures must be visible before review. Protected scopes require separate security, privacy, legal, or product review.

workflowSteps.label: Human Merge-Gate
workflowSteps.description: Merge remains blocked until a human owner reviews the PR, confirms checks, confirms protected-scope boundaries, and explicitly merges outside the read-only Agent Center UI.

hardBlocks: No Agent Center button may directly create a PR, merge, deploy, approve protected runtime actions, authorize rewards, or authorize mission completion.
No Auto-Merge or Auto-Deploy is allowed from the compact approval list.
Mission, reward, token, wallet, payment, betting, health, child-safety, location, camera, legal, privacy, and Unity/AR protected scopes remain review_required.
futureImplementationRequirements: Authenticated owner identity and audit trail
